text.value:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS dbo.dim_country;

CREATE TABLE dbo.dim_country
AS
SELECT
    -- Keys
    [#ISO] AS country_code,
    [geonameid] AS country_id,

    -- Core attributes
    [Country] AS country_name,
    [Capital] AS capital,
    CAST([Area(in sq km)] AS INT) AS country_area,
    CAST([Population] AS BIGINT) AS country_pop,
    CASE
        WHEN [Continent] = 'EU' THEN 'Europe'
        WHEN [Continent] = 'AS' THEN 'Asia'
        WHEN [Continent] = 'AF' THEN 'Africa'
        WHEN [Continent] = 'NA' THEN 'North America'
        WHEN [Continent] = 'AN' THEN 'Antarctica'
        WHEN [Continent] = 'SA' THEN 'South America'
        WHEN [Continent] = 'OC' THEN 'Oceania'
        END AS continent,

    -- Currency
    [CurrencyCode] AS currency_code,
    [CurrencyName] AS currency_name,

    -- Other raw fields
    [Languages] AS languages,
    [neighbours] AS neighbours,

    -- Density category
    CASE 
        WHEN [Area(in sq km)] IS NULL OR [Area(in sq km)] = 0 THEN NULL
        WHEN (CAST([Population] AS FLOAT) / CAST([Area(in sq km)] AS FLOAT)) < 50 THEN 'very low'
        WHEN (CAST([Population] AS FLOAT) / CAST([Area(in sq km)] AS FLOAT)) < 150 THEN 'low'
        WHEN (CAST([Population] AS FLOAT) / CAST([Area(in sq km)] AS FLOAT)) < 300 THEN 'medium'
        WHEN (CAST([Population] AS FLOAT) / CAST([Area(in sq km)] AS FLOAT)) < 600 THEN 'high'
        ELSE 'very high'
    END AS country_density_category,

    -- Languages count
    CASE 
        WHEN [Languages] IS NULL OR [Languages] = '' THEN 0
        ELSE LEN([Languages]) - LEN(REPLACE([Languages], ',', '')) + 1
    END AS languages_count,

    -- Neighbours count
    CASE 
        WHEN [neighbours] IS NULL OR [neighbours] = '' THEN 0
        ELSE LEN([neighbours]) - LEN(REPLACE([neighbours], ',', '')) + 1
    END AS neighbours_count,

    -- Country category
    CASE 
        WHEN [Population] >= 200000000 THEN 'demographic giant'
        WHEN [Population] >= 50000000  THEN 'large nation'
        WHEN [Population] >= 10000000  THEN 'mid-sized nation'
        WHEN [Population] >= 1000000   THEN 'small Nation'
        ELSE 'microstate'
    END AS country_category

FROM [lh_silver].[dbo].[Countries_raw];

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS wh_silver.dbo.cities_clean;

CREATE TABLE wh_silver.dbo.cities_clean AS

WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        geonameid AS city_id,
        name AS city_name,
        [country code] AS country_code,
        [feature code] AS feature_code,
        CAST(latitude AS DECIMAL(9,6)) AS latitude,
        CAST(longitude AS DECIMAL(9,6)) AS longitude,
        CAST(population AS INT) AS city_pop,
        CAST(dem AS INT) AS altitude,
        timezone
    FROM [lh_silver].[dbo].[Cities_raw]
    WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL
      AND longitude IS NOT NULL
      AND population IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT
    city_id,
    city_name,
    country_code,
    feature_code,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    city_pop,
    altitude,
    timezone,

    CASE 
        WHEN feature_code = 'PPLC' THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS is_capital,

    CASE 
        WHEN latitude > 0 THEN 'northern hemisphere'
        WHEN latitude < 0 THEN 'southern hemisphere'
        ELSE 'equator'
    END AS hemisphere,

    CASE 
        WHEN longitude > 0 THEN 'eastern hemisphere'
        WHEN longitude < 0 THEN 'western hemisphere'
        ELSE 'prime meridian'
    END AS longitudinal_zone,

    CASE
        WHEN latitude >= 0 AND longitude >= 0 THEN 'north-east'
        WHEN latitude >= 0 AND longitude < 0 THEN 'north-west'
        WHEN latitude < 0 AND longitude >= 0 THEN 'south-east'
        ELSE 'south-west'
    END AS global_quadrant,

    CASE 
        WHEN city_pop >= 10000000 THEN 'megacity'
        WHEN city_pop >= 5000000  THEN 'large City'
        WHEN city_pop >= 1000000  THEN 'metropolis'
        WHEN city_pop >= 250000   THEN 'medium City'
        ELSE 'small City'
    END AS city_category,

    LEFT(city_name, 1) AS city_first_letter,
    RIGHT(city_name, 1) AS city_last_letter,

    CASE 
        WHEN LEN(city_name) <= 5 THEN 'short name'
        WHEN LEN(city_name) <= 12 THEN 'medium name'
        ELSE 'long name'
    END AS city_name_length_category,

    CASE 
        WHEN (LEN(city_name) - LEN(REPLACE(city_name, ' ', '')) + 1) = 1 THEN 'single word'
        WHEN (LEN(city_name) - LEN(REPLACE(city_name, ' ', '')) + 1) = 2 THEN 'compound name'
        ELSE 'multiple words'
    END AS city_word_count_category,

    CASE 
        WHEN altitude IS NULL THEN 'unknown'
        WHEN altitude < 200 THEN 'low'
        WHEN altitude < 1000 THEN 'medium'
        ELSE 'high'
    END AS altitude_category

FROM base;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS dbo.coast_distance_clean

CREATE TABLE dbo.coast_distance_clean AS

SELECT
    geonameid AS city_id,
    ROUND(CAST(distance_km AS FLOAT), 0) AS coastal_distance,
    CASE 
        WHEN CAST(distance_km AS FLOAT) <= 5   THEN 'coastal / shoreline'
        WHEN CAST(distance_km AS FLOAT) <= 50  THEN 'near-coastal'
        WHEN CAST(distance_km AS FLOAT) <= 100 THEN 'inland coastal zone'
        WHEN CAST(distance_km AS FLOAT) <= 500 THEN 'continental'
        ELSE 'deep continental / landlocked'
    END AS coastal_distance_category
FROM [lh_silver].[dbo].[Coastal_distances_raw];

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS dbo.dim_city;



CREATE TABLE dbo.dim_city AS



SELECT 

    CAST(ci.city_id AS BIGINT) AS city_id,

    ci.city_name,

    ci.country_code,

    ci.latitude,

    ci.longitude,

    ci.city_pop,

    ci.altitude_category,

    ci.timezone,

    ci.is_capital,

    ci.hemisphere,

    ci.longitudinal_zone,

    ci.global_quadrant,

    ci.city_category,

    ci.city_first_letter,

    ci.city_last_letter,

    ci.city_name_length_category,

    ci.city_word_count_category,



    cd.coastal_distance,



    CASE 

        WHEN cd.coastal_distance IS NULL THEN 'unknown'

        ELSE cd.coastal_distance_category

    END AS coastal_distance_category,



        CASE

        WHEN ci.city_pop IS NOT NULL AND ci.city_pop > 0

        THEN LOG10(CAST(ci.city_pop AS FLOAT))

             + CASE WHEN ci.is_capital = 1 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END

        ELSE NULL

    END AS city_score



FROM [wh_silver].[dbo].[cities_clean] ci



LEFT JOIN [wh_silver].[dbo].[coast_distance_clean] cd

    ON CAST(ci.city_id AS BIGINT) = cd.city_id;
